---
name: General issue
about: Report a docs, workflow, or repository hygiene issue that does not fit the forms.
title: "[Issue]: "
labels: ["question", "public-surface"]
---

## Summary

Describe the issue in plain language.

## Affected Surface

- CLI
- Dashboard
- Optional carve surface
- Docs / public surface / contributor flow
- Repository guardrails
- Other

## Evidence

List the exact command, file, or page involved.

## Notes

Do not include secrets, private evidence, or live Apple Notes data in public
issues.
